name: CommandPromptPosition
summary: Defines enumerated constant values for default positions of the command prompt inside the frame of the full editor window.

enum_values.name: Top
enum_values.summary: The command prompt is shown on top.

enum_values.name: Bottom
enum_values.summary: The command prompt is shown at the bottom.

enum_values.name: Floating
enum_values.summary: The command prompt is shown floating.

enum_values.name: Hidden
enum_values.summary: The command prompt is shown hidden.
